camera._comment_fov: Horizontal Field of View of the drone camera in degrees. Used by the Cartographer for pixel-to-meter distance scaling.
camera._comment_width: Native width of the raw drone image in pixels.
camera._comment_height: Native height of the raw drone image in pixels.

slicer._comment_tile: Pixel dimension for the square crops sent to the neural network. Must match the model's expected input.
slicer._comment_overlap: Percentage of overlap (0.0 to 1.0) between chopped tiles. Prevents meteorites lying directly on a cut-line from being missed.

inquisitor._comment_batch: Number of tiles processed simultaneously by the GPU. Lower this to 16 or 8 if you experience CUDA 'Out of Memory' crashes.
inquisitor._comment_threshold: Minimum probability score (0.0 to 1.0) required for the raw GPU to flag a tile as a potential meteorite.

skeptic._comment_threshold: Minimum probability score required after the CPU rotates and re-evaluates the candidate 3 times to weed out false positives.
skeptic._comment_density: Maximum number of candidates allowed per 44MP image. Automatically discards massive clusters caused by lighting glitches or specific terrain features.
